description_long: This is a large, ornate battle axe with a robust, metallic head featuring a semi-circular blade and several decorative bolts or rivets along its edge. The blade is thick and reinforced, with a secondary, smaller blade or spike opposite the main cutting edge, giving it a menacing, double-sided appearance. The central section of the axe head is supported by a complex, mechanical-looking structure with circular and angular elements, suggesting both strength and intricate craftsmanship. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood with metal reinforcements, including a spiked pommel at the base for added functionality or combat use. The grip section of the handle is textured or wrapped for secure handling, and the overall design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application. The color palette is dominated by metallic grays, browns, and hints of red from the rivets, giving it a rugged, battle-worn look.
description: A large, ornate battle axe with a semi-circular metallic blade, reinforced head, and a long, textured wooden handle with metal accents and a spiked pommel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full semi-circular blade, decorative bolts, and the detailed handle with a spiked pommel.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle, with minimal blade detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the blade's curvature, bolts, and handle details.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, again emphasizing the handle's cylindrical form and the blade's thickness.
attribute_handle_type: Long, cylindrical wooden handle with metal reinforcements, textured grip, and a spiked metal pommel; straight and robust.
attribute_blade_design: Semi-circular, single-edged steel blade with decorative bolts, reinforced spine, and a secondary spike opposite the main edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern reinforced mounting with visible bolts and mechanical supports securing the blade to the handle.
